title: bromus araucanus var. obtusiflorus
intro: Bromus araucanus var. obtusiflorus, also known as the Chilean bromus or Chilean brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, primarily due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Bromus araucanus var. obtusiflorus typically involve infusion or decoction of the leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various ailments.
